title: WAF Path Traversal Attack Blocked
description: Detects directory traversal (path traversal) attacks blocked by WAF. Attackers attempt to access files outside the web root using ../ sequences. OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and ( (('Request URL' like '*../*' or 'Request URL' like '*..%2f*' or 'Request URL' like '*..%5c*' or 'Request URL' like '*..%252f*' or 'Request URL' like '*%2e%2e/*' or 'Request URL' like '*%2e%2e%2f*' or 'Request URL' like '*..../*' or 'Request URL' like '*/etc/passwd*' or 'Request URL' like '*/etc/shadow*' or 'Request URL' like '*/proc/self*' or 'Request URL' like '*/windows/system32*' or 'Request URL' like '*boot.ini*' or 'Request URL' like '*win.ini*')) or ('Rule Key' like '*930*') ))
falsepositives: Misconfigured web applications with legitimate relative paths
